rogue-drone.name: Rogue Drone
rogue-drone.description: A maintenance drone with corrupted firmware. Its single eye glows an angry red.

rad-beast.name: Rad Beast
rad-beast.description: A creature warped by decades of radiation exposure. It moves on too many legs.

tunnel-crawler.name: Tunnel Crawler
tunnel-crawler.description: A pale, eyeless thing that hunts by vibration in the dark tunnels.

bandit-scout.name: Bandit Scout
bandit-scout.description: A ragged figure with a makeshift weapon. Desperate eyes scan you for valuables.

security-turret.name: Security Turret
security-turret.description: An automated defense turret. Still running on emergency power after 40 years.

atlas-sentinel.name: ATLAS Sentinel
atlas-sentinel.description: A towering machine guardian. ATLAS built these to protect its core. They still obey.
